mapper.select: SELECT amst.autr_nm ,amst.autr_id ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ad_user_mst umst ,ad_user_autr_map amap WHERE amap.autr_id = amst.autr_id AND umst.user_id(+) = amap.user_id AND umst.DEL_YN = 'N' AND umst.USE_YN = 'Y') as userCnt ,TO_CHAR((SELECT stm_fir_reg_date from AD_AUTR_MST where autr_id = amst.autr_id),'YYYY-MM-DD') as stm_fir_reg_date FROM ad_autr_mst amst WHERE 1=1 AND amst.DEL_YN = 'N' AND amst.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY amst.stm_last_upd_date desc

SELECT usr.user_id , usr.user_nm , usr.use_yn , amap.autr_id , co.comm_cd AS user_co_cd , co.cd_nm AS user_co_nm FROM ad_user_mst usr ,( SELECT cd.comm_grp_cd, cd.comm_cd, cd.cd_nm FROM ad_comm_grp_cd grp, ad_comm_cd cd WHERE grp.comm_grp_cd = 'USER_CO_FG_CD' AND grp.comm_grp_cd = cd.comm_grp_cd ) co ,ad_autr_mst autr ,ad_user_autr_map amap WHERE usr.user_co_fg_cd = co.comm_cd (+) AND usr.user_id = amap.user_id AND autr.autr_id = #{autrId} AND usr.del_yn = 'N' AND usr.use_yn = 'Y' AND autr.del_yn = 'N' AND autr.use_yn = 'Y' AND autr.autr_id = amap.autr_id AND usr.del_yn = 'N'

SELECT mmst.menu_id AS id , NVL(mmst.par_menu_id,'0000') AS parentId , mmst.menu_nm as title , CASE WHEN amenu.menu_id = mmst.menu_id THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as myMenuYn FROM (SELECT mst.menu_id FROM ad_menu_mst mst , ad_autr_menu_map mmap WHERE mst.menu_id = mmap.menu_id AND mmap.autr_id = #{autrId} ) amenu , (SELECT level AS lvl , mst.menu_id , mst.menu_nm , mst.menu_expl , mst.par_menu_id , mst.menu_path , mst.sort_seq , mst.use_yn FROM ad_menu_mst mst START WITH mst.par_menu_id IS NULL CONNECT BY mst.par_menu_id = PRIOR menu_id ORDER SIBLINGS BY mst.sort_seq) mmst WHERE amenu.menu_id(+) = mmst.menu_id AND mmst.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT AUM.USER_ID , AUM.USER_NM || '(' || AUM.USER_ID || ')' AS LABEL FROM AD_USER_MST AUM , ( SELECT AUAM.USER_ID FROM AD_USER_AUTR_MAP AUAM , AD_AUTR_MENU_MAP AAMM WHERE AUAM.AUTR_ID = AAMM.AUTR_ID(+) AND USER_ID != #{userId} AND AAMM.MENU_ID = '2500' GROUP BY AUAM.USER_ID ) AUTR WHERE AUM.USER_ID = AUTR.USER_ID AND AUM.DEL_YN = 'N' AND AUM.USE_YN = 'Y' AND AUM.JOIN_APRV_STS_CD = '1' ORDER BY AUM.USER_NM

SELECT mst.menu_id AS id , NVL(mst.par_menu_id,'0000') AS parentId , mst.menu_nm as title FROM ad_menu_mst mst START WITH mst.par_menu_id IS NULL CONNECT BY mst.par_menu_id = PRIOR menu_id AND mst.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER SIBLINGS BY mst.sort_seq
SELECT autr_id ,autr_nm ,autr_expl FROM ad_autr_mst WHERE autr_id = #{autrId}
SELECT count(*) AS total FROM ad_autr_mst WHERE autr_nm =#{autrNm} AND del_yn = 'N'
